summary: ThreeDScene: right-hand rule for 3D orientation. ValueTracker t_tr interpolates identity → F=diag(1, 1, -1) (z-flip). GREEN î, RED ĵ, BLUE k̂ basis + PURPLE/YELLOW î×ĵ cross product arrow (PURPLE when aligned with k̂ = right-handed, YELLOW when opposite = left-handed). Live t, det, handedness status.
